global_context.scene_description: A photorealistic interior scene of a comfortable Phoenix-area family living room in the late afternoon. A parent (woman, mid-30s, casual outfit, cropped at chest level so face is not the focal point) sits on a cream-colored fabric couch with her feet up on a cushioned ottoman, holding a coffee mug. A child of about 5 years old sits on a soft area rug on the floor in the foreground, playing with wooden block toys. The room is decorated in warm Southwestern style — terracotta and cream tones, woven blanket, low wooden coffee table, indoor potted cactus. Through a window in the background: dry desert landscape and intense Phoenix afternoon sun outside, but the interior light is soft and cool. A modern white wall thermostat is mounted on the wall reading a comfortable 72°. The image has THREE text overlay elements composited as part of the final design: (1) a small narrow red horizontal sash spanning the very top edge of the frame containing the bold all-caps white text 'PHOENIX HOMEOWNERS' centered, (2) very large bold all-caps white sans-serif headline text 'IT DOESN'T HAVE TO BE A CRISIS.' positioned in the upper portion of the frame, with subtle dark drop-shadow or semi-transparent dark backdrop behind the text for legibility against the bright window light behind, (3) a tall solid bright red horizontal banner spanning the entire bottom edge of the frame, approximately 12% of image height, containing the bold all-caps white text 'FREE IN-HOME ESTIMATE • 602-905-1450' centered. Text overlays rendered crisply and cleanly. Photorealistic, shot on 35mm lens.
global_context.time_of_day: late afternoon, soft indoor light, intense Phoenix sun outside the window
global_context.weather_atmosphere: interior cool and calm; exterior visibly hot through window
